title: Twig Angel Ring
description: A simple angel ring mod that is craftable in survival, allowing for creative flight, and infinite elytra boosting.
body:
This mod adds a single item: the angel ring. This ring enables a survival player equipped with it in a ring slot provided by [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) or [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories) (provided if you use Accesories, you must have the trinkets compatibility layer: listed [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories-tc-layer)) to fly as if they were in creative mode, as well as being able to drop out of creative flight and enter elytra gliding, to then press a keybind (by default bound to R) to infinitely boost as if they were using rockets.

This ring is crafted at a crafting table with 4 Gold Blocks, 2 Netherite Ingots, 2 Feathers, and 1 elytra.

The reason I ultimately made this mod was because the alternative angel ring mods for fabric in 1.20.1 were lacking, and as the Create mod and a few other mods I love using are limited to 1.20.1 for the time being, I found this unsatisfactory, and this fixes several issues i had with the pre-existing mods, such as finnicky controls, straight up not working, or weird mechanics.

If you have any issues or requests/recommendations, please use the issue tracker on this mod's github.
